## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on weekly agenda process and meeting recording tools.](https://fathom.video/share/KDCLK1WvaDFqX_-KRNaCF71egYWvPdkm?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Agenda Timing:** Post agendas 30–60 mins pre-meeting to allow input without triggering pre-meeting questions.](https://fathom.video/share/KDCLK1WvaDFqX_-KRNaCF71egYWvPdkm?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [**Tool Comparison:** Fireflies is preferred for its superior transcript accuracy; Fathom's auto-join feature and speaker-ID issues (from using a team email) are key pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/KDCLK1WvaDFqX_-KRNaCF71egYWvPdkm?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [**Meeting Reschedule:** Reschedule or cancel the client sync, as the client was a no-show.](https://fathom.video/share/KDCLK1WvaDFqX_-KRNaCF71egYWvPdkm?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)

## Topics

### Agenda Timing Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Posting agendas too early triggers pre-meeting questions and "nitpicking."](https://fathom.video/share/KDCLK1WvaDFqX_-KRNaCF71egYWvPdkm?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [**Solution:** Post agendas 30–60 mins pre-meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/KDCLK1WvaDFqX_-KRNaCF71egYWvPdkm?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This window allows participants to add items without enough time to initiate lengthy discussions before the meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/KDCLK1WvaDFqX_-KRNaCF71egYWvPdkm?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [**Context:** This strategy was a best practice from a previous managing editor role.](https://fathom.video/share/KDCLK1WvaDFqX_-KRNaCF71egYWvPdkm?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)

### Meeting Recording Tool Comparison

  - [**Fireflies:**](https://fathom.video/share/KDCLK1WvaDFqX_-KRNaCF71egYWvPdkm?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [**Pro:** Highly accurate transcripts, even with diverse accents.](https://fathom.video/share/KDCLK1WvaDFqX_-KRNaCF71egYWvPdkm?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
      - [**Con:** Occasional misspellings of names.](https://fathom.video/share/KDCLK1WvaDFqX_-KRNaCF71egYWvPdkm?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [**Fathom:**](https://fathom.video/share/KDCLK1WvaDFqX_-KRNaCF71egYWvPdkm?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [**Con:** Auto-joins all meetings; no option to disable.](https://fathom.video/share/KDCLK1WvaDFqX_-KRNaCF71egYWvPdkm?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [**Con:** Speaker identification fails when logged into the team email, as it attributes all speech to the generic "GrowthX" user.](https://fathom.video/share/KDCLK1WvaDFqX_-KRNaCF71egYWvPdkm?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)

### Client No-Show

  - [The client did not attend the scheduled sync.](https://fathom.video/share/KDCLK1WvaDFqX_-KRNaCF71egYWvPdkm?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [**Action:** Carrie will contact the client via Slack to reschedule or cancel the meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/KDCLK1WvaDFqX_-KRNaCF71egYWvPdkm?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:** Contact the client via Slack to reschedule the meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/KDCLK1WvaDFqX_-KRNaCF71egYWvPdkm?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [**Carrie & Carly:** Sync separately in Slack to avoid recording internal discussion on the client's call.](https://fathom.video/share/KDCLK1WvaDFqX_-KRNaCF71egYWvPdkm?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
